25847fefd09e42509a90afb3793e14c4-1.description: Sets shared or transient state values from literals or other existing shared state values

values.title: List of values to create in shared state. Of the form "key=value", "key.subkey=value", "key=$key.subkey.subsubkey", etc
values.description: List of values to create in shared state. Of the form "key=value", "key.subkey=value", "key=$key.subkey.subsubkey", etc

1b565dccf3454f4b90c65516f90b6f64-1.description: Output the contents of a specific variable from nodeState onscreen to aid troubleshooting.

nodeStateVariable.title: NodeState Variable Name
nodeStateVariable.description: Enter the variable to retrieve and display from nodeState.

objectAttributes.title: Get ObjectAttributes?
objectAttributes.description: When this option is selected objectAttributes will be retrieved from both shared and transient state.

d0a055acaedd486b91fa88eddc6fccdb-1.description: A node which displays a message to display to the user

message.title: Message to display
message.description: Message to display to the user

e4a9455782434716b7f3e9540006d7f1-1.description: Sets the status which the front channel can read and display to the user as the back channel journey progresses.

journeyStatusKey.title: Journey Status sharedState Key
journeyStatusKey.description: The shared state key where the message object will be stored (e.g. transaction:notify). This is the top-level key that will be updated in the journey state.

journeyStatusProperty.title: Journey Status Property Name
journeyStatusProperty.description: The name of the property inside the shared state object (e.g. journeyStatus). This defines the field that will hold the message value.

journeyStatusValue.title: Journey Status Message
journeyStatusValue.description: The message to store in shared state. This value will be used by downstream nodes (e.g. Backchannel Notification) to update the front-channel experience.
